title: Curver Knit Laundry Hamper Basket, Stylish Plastic Woven Storage Bin for Clothes & Towels, Lightweight & Durable, Oasis White, 57L
features: Elegant storage solution – Perfect for bathroom and utility areas, combining style and functionality for organised spaces
Stylish KNIT design – Features comfortable handles and a 270-degree lid opening for effortless access to contents
Large 57 litre capacity – Ample storage space to hold laundry, cleaning supplies, or household items with ease
Durable, lightweight, and easy to clean – Crafted for long-lasting use with simple maintenance and portability
Proudly made in the UK and Europe – Quality craftsmanship ensuring reliability and eco-conscious manufacturing standards
Provides a stylish storage solution to any home
description: From the manufacturer Curver Knit Laundry Storage Hamper, Oasis White, 57 Litre Curver’s Knit range is inspired by the art and nostalgia of knitted textiles. Made from durable, long lasting resin with a natural open weave knit pattern, the Knit range is practical and stylish. The Knit 57 litre laundry hamper can take pride of place in any bathroom, bedroom or utility room. With a large 57 litre capacity and open weave style, it is designed to give good ventilation that will keep odours to a minimum. It comes with a large easy access lid, opening to a 270° angle and large oval handles to make usage comfortable. The hamper is also easy to clean and maintain. Main Features Exclusive Knit Design Comfortable Handles 270 degree lid opening Ideal storage solutions for anywhere in your home Bathroom In your bathroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising your towels, toiletries and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Kitchen In your kitchen, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising all of your spices, accessories,and utensils keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Living Room In your living area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your magazines, blankets and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Office or Study In your office or study area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your all of your pens, notepads and books keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish.
